steps.title: Use the change in the image
steps.content: The wooden figure's outline becomes clearer as the work takes on greater precision, grace, and beauty. In this context, "assumed" means took on or gained those qualities.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content:
• Choice B means admitted or recognized, which does not fit the figure's changing appearance.
  • Choice C means copied, but the work is not imitating precision.
  • Choice D means guessed, which is unrelated to the description.
The remaining choice means acquired. The answer is A.
